results.rendered_html:
tuṣṭa p. p. [tuṣ kartari kta]
1 Pleased, satisfied, delighted, gratified, contented.
2 Contented with what one possesses and indifferent to everything else.
— ṣṭaḥ N. of Viṣṇu.
